summary: Preferred modern source-generator package for ReactiveUI properties, commands, OAPHs, view wiring, and Fody-era migrations.
recommendedPatterns: Use ReactiveUI.SourceGenerators as the primary choice for new ReactiveUI code.
Generate migration guidance from ReactiveUI.Fody to ReactiveUI.SourceGenerators for legacy projects rather than preserving Fody by default.
avoidPatterns: Do not choose ReactiveUI.Fody for new projects when ReactiveUI.SourceGenerators is available.
Do not mix Fody and source generators randomly on the same code path.
Do not forget partial type requirements and generator package setup.
setupSteps: Add ReactiveUI.SourceGenerators with PrivateAssets=all when appropriate.
If migrating from ReactiveUI.Fody, remove Fody package/configuration and convert properties/commands incrementally.
commonPitfalls: Assuming generated members are visible to other generators in the same compilation round.
Leaving legacy Fody configuration behind after migration.

sources.title: ReactiveUI.SourceGenerators repository
sources.notes: Modern source-generator guidance and Fody replacement direction.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
